mapper.select: SELECT cs.*,su.user_name, pi.park_name FROM sys_car_scan cs LEFT JOIN sys_user su on cs.user_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_park_info pi on pi.park_id = cs.park_id where cs.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_car_scan (user_id, park_id, plate_color, plate_num, type, direction, picture, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{parkId}, #{plateColor}, #{plateNum}, #{type}, #{direction}, #{picture}, #{createTime})
